title: xylanthemum lingulatum
intro: Xylanthemum lingulatum, also known as the "toothed xylanthemum", is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Xylanthemum lingulatum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe digestive issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Xylanthemum lingulatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal properties to be effectively utilized.
